message:
feat: Add Dream Validation safety system for LoRA adapters

Implements post-training validation to prevent "nightmare" adapters from
degrading model quality:

- New src/dream_validator.zig with:
  - ValidationConfig for tunable thresholds (perplexity ratio, score, etc.)
  - Default embedded test set (6 tests: sanity, coherence, identity, domain)
  - Gibberish detection with repetition analysis and character distribution
  - DreamValidator struct with validateAdapter() method

- Hippocampus integration:
  - Validation runs after training but BEFORE marking events consolidated
  - Failed adapters archived to ~/.cache/zell/lora/failed/ for debugging
  - Events NOT marked consolidated on failure (retry next sleep cycle)
  - Consecutive failure tracking with warnings after 3 failures
  - initDreamValidator() method for runtime initialization

This prevents users from waking up to a broken model if training goes bad
(gradient explosion, catastrophic forgetting, encoding issues).
